test.create_query: CREATE TABLE string_subcolumn_tuple ( t Tuple( s0 String, s1 String, s2 String, s3 String, s4 String, s5 String, s6 String, s7 String, s8 String, s9 String, s10 String, s11 String, s12 String, s13 String, s14 String, s15 String, s16 String, s17 String, s18 String, s19 String ) ) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO string_subcolumn_tuple SELECT tuple( 's', 's', 's', 's', 's', 's', 's', 's', 's', 's', 's', 's', 's', 's', 's', 's', 's', 's', 's', 's' ) FROM numbers(10000000)
test.query: SELECT count() FROM string_subcolumn_tuple WHERE NOT ignore(t.s0)
SELECT count() FROM string_subcolumn_tuple WHERE NOT ignore(t.s19)
